{{ define "main" }} {{ $isDocs := eq .Section "docs" }} {{ if $isDocs }}
{{ partial "sidebar.html" . }}
{{ partial "breadcrumb.html" . }}

{{ .Title }}

{{ with .Description }}

{{ . }}

{{ end }}
{{ with .Params.since }} since {{ . }} {{ end }} {{ with .Lastmod }} Updated {{ .Format "2 Jan 2006" }} {{ end }}
{{ .Content }} {{ partial "pagination.html" . }}
{{ partial "toc.html" . }}
{{ else }}

{{ .Title }}

{{ with .Description }}

{{ . }}

{{ end }}
{{ .Content }}
{{ end }} {{ end }}
